Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: Since sprinting and drifting can be considered an overt and active search technique, let's also go ahead and lower the ship's Variable Depth Sonar using the EMCON menu.

Hit EMCON at the bottom right, then select 'Active VDS Sonar (HF)' and then hit 'Deploy'. This will begin streaming the towed array. Note that the automatic setting for towed sonar arrays is below the layer.
Note: towed arrays and towed decoys have a minimum and maximum allowed speed for the ship! Sea Power will alert you with a message if the ship is moving too fast or too slow to use the towed array.
